summary: Focused on building a custom GitHub profile with auto-generated CV cards, maintaining a Telegram automation node for n8n, and shipping a major update to a Windows file-tagging utility.

items.title: Automated GitHub profile and CV generation
items.description: Iterated on a workflow that generates a dynamic profile README with an LLM-powered CV timeline and sidebar cards.

items.title: Profile card generator and CV timeline
items.description: Built and refined a custom card generator that produces a combined profile SVG with a CV timeline.

items.title: Proxy API patch for Clash.Meta fork
items.description: Re-exposed proxy listing APIs in a Mihomo fork to support FlClash integration.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Stabilised the node package with CI fixes, auth handling improvements, and a new album trigger.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Prepared and documented the v2 release of a tool that adds tag support to Windows Explorer.

items.title: Personal Neovim development environment
items.description: Maintained a full Neovim IDE setup, migrating to newer APIs and improving remote session support.

items.title: On-host YOLO labelling tool
items.description: Started a minimalistic, fast labelling tool for personal computer vision projects.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Worked on session storage stability and version bumps for the n8n community node.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Finalised the v2 release with Microsoft Store listing and extended metadata support.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Launched the fork with Docker deployment support and initial auth fixes.
